creator: sanpei@yy.cs.keio.ac.jp
text:
>>   One solution is that ja-mh would use new japaneized MH patch(*1):
>> 
>> ftp://ftp.tut.ac.jp:/Linux/JE-0.9.8a/sources/net/mh-6.8.3+-jp2c+-1.02.patch.gz
>> 
>       
>       I once tried that, but it made no difference.

  Sorry, I did not try that before.  I reviewed packf problem under
jp2c+-1.02.patch, this patch also has problem.

  I compile with follow patch:

http://www.jp.freebsd.org/~yuki/FreeBSD/readmail.cgi?source=users-jp&docnum=5354
  
  packf is fine, but put some warnings as below

packf: .msgbox.map: version mismatch (50331648 != 3), continuing...
packf: .msgbox.map: version mismatch (50331648 != 3), continuing...
packf: unable to dup .msgbox.map: Too many open files, continuing...
packf: unable to dup .msgbox.map: Too many open files, continuing...

  This problem(version mismatch and Too many open files) was still
in mail/mh(MH-6.8.4).

Yoshiro MIHIRA
